description: Travis CI is a continuous integration and delivery service that runs builds and jobs for software repositories. It provides hosted CI for projects on travis-ci.com and related tooling for managing builds, logs, settings, and repository integrations.
summary: Travis CI exposes two documented HTTP APIs on `api.travis-ci.com` (current V3 and legacy V2.1) plus the official `travis` Ruby-gem CLI; all authenticated developer access uses a Travis CI API access token, typically minted via the CLI.
